headline: Is It Time To Reassess Global Payments (GPN) After Its Prolonged Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Global Payments at US$64.05 is starting to look interesting or still has work to do, the key question is what you are actually getting for that price. The stock has seen a 2.8% decline over the last 7 days, a 16.2% decline over the last 30 days, a 15.2% decline year to date, and a 23.6% decline over the last year, extending a 37.2% decline over 3 years and 68.6% decline over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Global Payments' position in the diversified...
